void spell_shock_blade(skill::type sn, i.name: spell_shock_blade
void spell_shock_blade(skill::type sn, i.argsstring: (skill::type sn, int level, Character *ch, void *vo, int target, int evolution)
void spell_shock_blade(skill::type sn, i.brief: Enhances a weapon with a shocking energy effect if conditions are met and provides visual feedback.
void spell_shock_blade(skill::type sn, i.details: This function attempts to apply a shocking energy enhancement to a specified weapon object. It first verifies that the target object is not a character itself. If the enhancement is successfully applied via enhance_blade, it dispatches messages to the character and the room indicating that the weapon crackles with energy and fills the room with sparks of electricity. The function does not return a value but performs side effects through message dispatching and object modification.

params.sn: The skill type identifier associated with this spell (not used directly in this implementation).
params.target: Integer indicating the target type (not used directly in this implementation).
params.ch: Pointer to the character attempting to enhance the weapon.
params.evolution: Integer representing the evolution state or variant of the enhancement effect.
params.level: The level of the spell or effect, influencing the strength of the enhancement.
params.vo: Pointer to the object (weapon) to be enhanced, cast to Object*.

void spell_shock_blade(skill::type sn, i.returns: This function has no return value; it performs side effects such as enhancing the weapon and dispatching messages.
